历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9398 → 9514 → 10604 → 13750 → 11706. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements and other factors, the ranking significantly dropped to 13750, but in 2025 it rebounded noticeably to 11706, with a fluctuation range of about 2044 positions in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 11706. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province from 2021 to 2025 was 143, 142, 142, 150, and 146 respectively. The 2026 plan is 141 students, a reduction of 5 students (-3.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 113th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113, placing it among mid-tier 211 institutions. The university is known for specialties such as Transportation Engineering, Navigation Technology, and Marine Engineering, attracting some candidates interested in related fields. In 2026, there is no negative public opinion related to Dalian Maritime University. Its Douyin popularity ranks 50th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 657,000. Short video exposure mainly features the library and campus life, indicating moderate to high overall attention, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning, adjacent to Jilin Province, and is a coastal city in Northeast China, offering natural regional affinity and employment location advantages for Jilin candidates. The Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, and Transportation. Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and strongly recommended, with strong application willingness. The estimated total number of Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 79,800 (based on a recent proportion of 72%), roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 340 points, slightly lower than 345 points in 2024, reflecting a slight easing of overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11706, a 5-student reduction (-3.4%) in 2026, sustained high popularity of popular engineering majors driving up application enthusiasm, a slight decrease in the provincial control line reflecting eased overall competition, and a roughly stable total number of candidates, the intensifying competition effect from enrollment reduction and increased major popularity outweighs the easing effect from the slight drop in the provincial control line. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly improve from 11706. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11435, with a range of 10935 to 11935.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Network Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Rescue and Salvage Engineering)
- Transportation (Transportation, Logistics Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Traffic Engineering)
- Marine Engineering (Land-based Major)
- Maritime Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, E-commerce)
- Logistics Management
- Safety Engineering
- Applied Physics
- English (only for English test takers, requires oral exam)
- Japanese (only for English test takers, requires oral exam).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10935–11935, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<10935), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>11935), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 and apply cautiously.

The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2160th. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province from 2021 to 2025 was 16, 16, 17, 17, 17 students respectively, and the 2026 plan is 18 students, a slight expansion of 1 student (+5.9%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113, placing it among mid-tier 211 institutions. The university is known for specialties such as Transportation Engineering and Navigation Technology, attracting certain candidates. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category majors mainly include Law, Business Administration, English, and Japanese. The popularity of Law is polarized and watched, while foreign language majors are generally stable. Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning, adjacent to Jilin Province, and is a coastal city in Northeast China, offering natural regional affinity and employment location advantages for Jilin candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2160th, a slight expansion of 1 student (+5.9%) in 2026, an increase in the provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, a roughly stable total number of examinees, and relatively hot Douyin popularity, the easing effect of expansion and the competitive pressure from the rising control line offset each other. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 2160th. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2226th, with a range of 1726 to 2726.
